subject: Invoice INV-2026-0004 – May Bloomberg Terminal & Enterprise Data Services
preview: Please find attached your May invoice for Bloomberg Professional Services and enterprise data feeds.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0004 covering Bloomberg Professional terminal licenses, enterprise data feeds, and analytics modules for the May 2026 service period.

Total Amount: USD 48,177.19
Due Date: June 15, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Remit payment via wire transfer using the banking details on the invoice. For billing inquiries, please reply to this email and reference the invoice number.

Best regards,
Bloomberg L.P. – Global Billing
